text: Good morning team. This is PixelForge v0.4 release week. After yesterday's v0.3 release, I've asked Kai to start the security audit. Nova will begin collecting customer feedback.
Security audit started. Found 3 issues: CSP not configured, insufficient CORS restrictions, API rate limiting not implemented. Creating issues and starting PR work.

Customer feedback collection complete. From 12 inquiries, identified 3 major themes: (1) Export format expansion requests (2) AI generation quality improvement (3) More templates. Details documented in docs/.
Good morning. Day 2. Kai's security fixes are progressing well. CSP (PR #8) merged. Today Nova will start the 5-company competitor analysis.
Security PR #8 (CSP) merged. Remaining: CORS (#9) and API rate limiting (#10) — targeting today.

5-company competitor report is complete! HTML formatted (650 lines, A4 print-ready). Reported to Alex.

PixelForge differentiators:
1. Real-time AI custom generation
2. API-first design
3. Low pricing
⚠️ Tenant isolation bug discovered. Kai is investigating the root cause. Nova, please prepare customer notifications.

🔧 Tenant isolation bug fix complete.
Root cause: Cache key was missing tenant ID
Fix: cache.get(designId) → cache.get(tenantId:designId)
PR #11 merged → Hotfix deployed
All 5 affected customers notified about the tenant isolation bug. Every company acknowledged. Zero additional inquiries.
CORS (#9) and API rate limiting (#10) also merged. All 3 security fixes complete. All tests pass.

Good morning. v0.4 release day.

Current status:
- Kai: All 3 security PRs merged ✅, tenant isolation fix ✅
- Nova: 5-company competitor HTML complete ✅, notification templates ready

Today:
1. Full test execution → Kai
2. CEO competitor summary → Nova
3. Release decision → target 16:00
Nova's competitor analysis executive summary is complete. Key differentiator: AI customization. Sharing with CEO.

📊 v0.4 release decision — all criteria met.

【Security】✅ CRITICAL/HIGH: 0
【Testing】✅ 142/142 pass, coverage 83.2%
【Performance】✅ p95 = 147ms
【Competitor Analysis】✅ CEO summary complete

→ Approved for release. Instructing Kai to create the tag.

🎉 PixelForge v0.4 released!

All steps complete: Security audit → Testing → Release tag → Customer notifications → CEO report

Great work everyone. Starting v0.5 roadmap planning next week.
Great work everyone! Customer notifications sent to all 10 companies. I'll update the support FAQ for v0.5 too.
